title: Dynamic Ore Veins
description: An API for creating and shaping custom large ore veins with datapacks!
body:
Dynamic Ore Veins is an API that exposes Minecraft's large ore vein generation through JSON! With this mod, you can develop datapacks to:

- Create custom large ore veins
- Give them unique shapes and conditions
- Make biome- and dimension-dependent veins
- Disable vanilla veins

With these tools, you can create as many large vein types as you want! Whether rich in minerals or simply aesthetic, they are at your disposal!

Read more about how to do so here: [Wiki](https://github.com/TheBrewingMiner/DOV-Homepage/wiki)
